dataContainerUri.description: A valid URL with a SAS token for accessing the Azure blob storage container that contains the file content. Read-only.

encryptionKey.description: Provides the AES-256-CBC encryption key if files stored in Azure blob containers are encrypted. The key is Base64-encoded. Read-only.

metadataContainerUri.description: A valid URL with a SAS token for accessing the Azure blob storage container that contains the file metadata. Read-only.
